ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly includes 'Babidi'; the depicted small alien figure with oversized round head, dark ceremonial robes, and the organic pink interior background exactly matches Babidi's canonical design and his Buu-revival context. Confirmed via Dragon Ball Wiki.

trivia_bullets.text: TB2-013 is a Common from DBS-TB02 (Themed Booster pack World Martial Arts Tournament), released September 21, 2019 by Bandai. The 125-card set focuses on the 25th Tenkaichi Budokai arc and the early Buu Saga. [dbs-cardgame.com TB02 product page]

Babidi is the alien sorcerer son/clone of Bibidi who orchestrated Majin Buu's revival. His plan involved gathering energy from Earth's fighters at the 25th World Martial Arts Tournament — the exact event this card set is themed around. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Babidi]

The 'Dark Duo' title pairs Babidi with Majin Buu — the organic pink interior background in the art is consistent with Majin Buu's body interior, where Babidi frequently operated and commanded Buu. The 'duo' framing captures their grotesque codependency: Babidi needed Buu as muscle; Buu tolerated Babidi just long enough before destroying him. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Babidi]
